reasoning: SPY at 676.60, approaching premarket high (PMH) 677.45 from below. Overnight gap +17.34 (up) established risk-on tone. Primary scenario: SPY holds 677.45 on first test, targets 680 psychological round. Secondary: breaks through PMH toward 679-680. Risk: rejection below 676.0 opens retest to 659.6 PRTH or lower.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 677.45 PMH on first test
